name: ai.callmcp/server
description: One MCP tool contract for telephony — any call provider, hosted, local, or BYOK.

environmentVariables.name: CALLMCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to a callmcp.config.json file. Omit to configure entirely via env vars.

environmentVariables.name: CALLMCP_DEFAULT_DRIVER
environmentVariables.description: driver_id routed to when a tool call omits `driver` (e.g. kaicalls, dograh, twilio_openai).
